author: claude

patch.value: Prepend merge promotes a stale Unreleased section into the released version instead of duplicating it (GH #47)

mergeChangelog in prepend mode inserted the generated ## <version> section while leaving the prior ## Unreleased section (same items) in place, so every released CHANGELOG ended up with both. Fix: when the generated output carries a concrete version and no Unreleased section of its own, promote a leading ## Unreleased into the version it ships in (Keep a Changelog semantics), consuming it once for the newest version.

message: Track GH #47 prepend-merge Unreleased duplication fix

patch.value: Promote a leading Unreleased section into the generated version in prepend merge (Keep a Changelog), consumed once for the newest version; generator-emitted Unreleased still replaces normally.
Released changelog has no duplicate Unreleased section
No duplicate; 103 tests pass incl. 2 new merge tests; release:check green
